Home / Service Areas / Mesa

Painting contractor in Mesa, AZ

Trusted local professionals serving Mesa and surrounding communities

Serving Mesa, AZ

Jr's Painting has extensive experience serving the Mesa, Arizona community. Mesa features a diverse range of homes, including many 1970s and 80s stucco properties. We specialize in revitalizing these homes with modern color palettes and durable coatings that protect against the intense Arizona sun, where temperatures can soar above 110 degrees Fahrenheit during the summer months.

Mesa's prevalent stucco homes from the 70s and 80s require specific painting techniques for optimal results and longevity.

Painting contractor Services in Mesa

Exterior Painting

Protect and beautify your home with our expert exterior painting services.

Transform your living spaces with our professional interior painting services.

Stucco Repair

Maintain the integrity of your stucco with our expert repair services.

Learn more →

Commercial Painting

Professional commercial painting services to enhance your business space.

Learn more →

Drywall Repair

Restore your walls to perfection with our professional drywall repair services.
